title: Blast Radius Policy v1
description: Policy envelope defining depth and invariant/metric caps for blast-radius computations around graph nodes (e.g., dungeonNodeContract).

id.description: Stable identifier for this blast-radius policy document.

objectKind.description: Contract family this policy applies to e.g., dungeonNodeContract, regionContractCard.

tier.description: Governance tier for which this policy is valid.

maxDepth.description: Absolute maximum traversal depth allowed when computing blast radius from any starting node.

invariantCaps.description: Upper bounds on cumulative invariant deltas along any path inside the blast radius.

maxDetDelta.description: Maximum allowed cumulative DET delta along a path from the origin node.

maxCicDelta.description: Maximum allowed cumulative CIC delta along a path from the origin node.

maxAosDelta.description: Maximum allowed cumulative AOS delta along a path from the origin node.

maxRiskScore.description: Maximum allowed combined risk score using the riskWeights below (e.g., CIC/AOS/DET weighted sum).

riskWeights.description: Weights for combining invariant deltas into a scalar risk score.

wCic.description: Weight for |ΔCIC| in the risk score.

wAos.description: Weight for |ΔAOS| in the risk score.

wDet.description: Weight for positive ΔDET in the risk score.

engagementTargets.description: Preferred engagement bands inside the blast radius, used as soft guidance for map design and AI-Chat.

uecBand.description: Inclusive [min,max] band for UEC across nodes in the blast radius.

arrBand.description: Inclusive [min,max] band for ARR across nodes in the blast radius.

cdlCap.description: Maximum acceptable CDL inside the radius; higher CDL paths should be excluded from safe neighborhoods.

notes.description: Optional human-readable explanation of this policy.

prismMeta.description: Standard prism metadata block for provenance and Dead-Ledger references.
